title: More Stuff
description: Just adding more stuff to the game for fun!
body:
# Main overview
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod adds whatever i can think of to minecraft! I hope you really enjoy this mod as it will add so many things to the game!

## Features
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod mainly adds swords, armor, pickaxes, and effects!
![good sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/737926facd64296940765b9ac6949aec67a051c3.png)
_a very powerful sword about to hit a creeper_

## Discord
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[The Discord](https://discord.gg/A62e7PJyr2) Use this to talk about the mod, report any issues you have with the mod, and suggest new items!

## current reports
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2.0.0 IS NOW OUT!!!!!!!!!!!!!1
